race.comment: Competitive finish. BOTANICAL BOY (8) resumes. He's a progressive sort who put up two strong winning performances last time in before being sent out $2.50 favourite in tougher company at Flemington. He's jumped out well and if ready to go, he's got the class. DANTOOINE (11) has the race fitness advantage, just finding one better over 1500m his past couple of starts. Fancy back to 1400m where he won prior suits a touch better, go close. CHEST OF GOLD (6) struggled fresh on heavy going but is better than that and can improve sharply. KAHHOF (5) has claims in best and is capable of better, including STAY SILENT (9) up on speed from a soft gate.
